note: BIS Statistics Data Portal bulk downloads — quarterly macroprudential indicators on 9 emerging markets (BIS_EM) + 8 advanced economies (BIS_AE). Roadmap #13 Phase 2 (2026-05). Brings Brazil, China, India, Mexico, Korea, Turkey, South Africa, Russia, Indonesia onto the CPV panel — entirely absent from prior horizons. Tests the Borio-Drehmann credit-to-GDP gap (Basel III CCyB signal) under the dual-null Gate 1 framework.

datasets.name: BIS Total Credit to non-financial sector

variable_codes.notes: Credit-to-GDP gap (Borio-Drehmann CCyB signal). Tracks credit booms relative to long-run HP-filtered trend. Basel III CCyB primary trigger.
Credit-to-GDP actual ratio. Raw level for the credit cycle.
Residential property prices (nominal). Kuznets construction-swing channel.
Total credit to private non-financial sector (% of GDP). Borio financial-cycle headline.
